commit.name: Weather Card
commit.description: Data display with props, design tokens, and responsive layout
commit.prompt:
Build a weather card component. It should display:
- Current temperature (large, prominent)
- Weather condition with an appropriate icon/emoji (sunny, cloudy, rainy, etc.)
- Humidity percentage
- Wind speed
- A 5-day forecast strip at the bottom showing day name, icon, and high/low temps

All data must come from props — never hardcode weather data. Use CSS variables from the design system for all colors and spacing.

generation.compiledCode: var S=Object.defineProperty;var a=(t,e)=>S(t,"name",{value:e,configurable:!0});import{jsx as o,jsxs as y}from"react/jsx-runtime";const p={Sunny:"\u2600\uFE0F",Cloudy:"\u2601\uFE0F",Rainy:"\u{1F327}\uFE0F",Snowy:"\u2744\uFE0F","Partly Cloudy":"\u26C5",Thunderstorm:"\u26C8\uFE0F"},T="\u2601\uFE0F",_={HUMIDITY:"Humidity",WIND_SPEED:"Wind Speed"},E={C:"\xB0C",F:"\xB0F"},N={C:"km/h",F:"mph"},l="C",A=5,W=a(t=>{const{temperature:e,humidity:r,windSpeed:d,unit:n="C",forecast:i=[]}=t,c=`${e}\xB0${n}`,m=`${d} ${n==="C"?"km/h":"mph"}`,h=`${r}%`,C=n,u=i.map(s=>({...s,formattedHigh:`${s.high}\xB0`,formattedLow:`${s.low}\xB0`}));return{formattedTemp:c,formattedWind:m,formattedHumidity:h,displayUnit:C,forecastItems:u}},"useWeather");function D(t){const{formattedTemp:e,formattedWind:r,formattedHumidity:d,displayUnit:n,forecastItems:i}=W(t);return o(Container,{maxWidth:"sm",children:o(Card,{shadow:"md",padding:24,children:y(Stack,{direction:"vertical",gap:24,children:[o(WeatherHeader,{city:t.city,condition:t.condition}),o(WeatherMain,{temp:e,condition:t.condition}),o(WeatherMetrics,{humidity:d,windSpeed:r}),o(WeatherForecast,{forecast:i})]})})})}a(D,"WeatherCard");function f(t){const e=useComponent(t);return o(ComponentUI,{...t,...e})}a(f,"Component");export{f as default};

evaluation.critique: The component has solid data handling and hierarchy, but has inconsistent design token usage (hardcoded pixel values like '64px' and '8px' for gaps instead of var(--ggui-spacing-*)), and lacks polish features like hover states, transitions, and loading states. The layout is generally good but some spacing relies on raw pixel values.

violations: Hardcoded string "Sunny" found — should be a prop default
